Active defenses equal 0, often prone. Su: Active defenses equal 0, often prone. Supersedes Vulnerable.
clear-legacy-confirmation-body: This will permanently delete every row in your legacy Powers, Equipment, Vehicles, and Headquarters sections. The pre-3.0 archive will be gone. Use this only after you've verified your migrated data in the new builder and don't need the archive for reference.
compendium-no-combat-skills: No Combat Skills yet — add one in Skills to set the attack bonus.
compendium-updating-existing: Updating existing effect — currently applied modifiers are pre-selected. Uncheck to remove.
condition_penalty: Condition Penalty applied to all rolls
Defenseless, immobile, and physically st: Defenseless, immobile, and physically stunned; may be able to take mental actions.
Defenseless, stunned, and unaware. Usual: Defenseless, stunned, and unaware. Usually prone.
Have no movement speed, cannot move, but: Have no movement speed, cannot move, but can actions. Supersedes Hindered.
Hindered and vulnerable, immobile if res: Hindered and vulnerable, immobile if restraints are anchored.
Hindered, -5 penalty on close attack che: Hindered, -5 penalty on close attack checks, +5 bonus to attacker's close attack checks, but -5 penalty to attacker's ranged attack checks. Move action to stand.
Hindered, recover after 1 hour of rest.
Hindered, visually unaware, vulnerable,: Hindered, visually unaware, vulnerable, may be impaired or disabled for visual tasks.
Impaired and hindered, recover after 1 h: Impaired and hindered, recover after 1 hour of rest.
label: Label
May only take a single standard action: May only take a single standard action
name: name
rerun-confirmation-body: This will delete every current row in your Powers, Equipment, Vehicles, and Headquarters sections that was created by migration, then re-run conversion against the Legacy Archive. Any manual edits you've made to migrated rows will be lost. Use this only if your initial conversion was incomplete or produced incorrect output.
Single standard action determined by ano: Single standard action determined by another.
Stunned, but may only pay to entrancemen: Stunned, but may only pay to entrancement effect. Breaks free if threatened or from allies interaction skill check (DC 10+effect rank).
Temporarily lose power points in a trait: Temporarily lose power points in a trait. Depends on effect.
title: Title
Traits altered by an outside agent. Depe: Traits altered by an outside agent. Depends on effect.
Unable to make interactions or Perceptio: Unable to make interactions or Perception checks or perform actions based on them.
power_tutorial_1_3a: Devam etmek ve temizlemek için bu mesajlara tıklayın!
power_tutorial_1_3b: Powers are put together by different elements! Think of them as bricks you put together to build your powers.
power_tutorial_1_3c: Güç efektleriniz ve Güç saldırılarınız en önemli bilgilerinizi içerir.
power_tutorial_1_3d: Ancak bunları düzenlemek için Başlıklar ve Sıfatlar kullanılarak karmaşık güçlere yardımcı olabilir.
power_tutorial_2_3a: Here is an example of some powers using Headers, Titles, and Notes to help organize power effects.
power_tutorial_3_3a: Yeni bir Güç öğesi eklemek için fareyi sola götürün ve "Ekle" düğmesini tıklayın. Sağ taraf size karakter sayfasında nasıl görüntüleneceğinin bir ön izlemesini verecektir!
power_tutorial_3_3b: İpucu: Sağ tarafta öğelerin sırasını değiştirmek daha kolaydır.
power_tutorial_3_3c: Tip #2: Most elements have collapsible descriptions for extra information or descriptions that you don't need visible all the time. Clicking on them in the Display Window opens or closes it.
power_tutorial_3_3d: Küçük bir hatırlatma! Öğeleri yeniden düzenlemek, yeni bir öğe ekleyene kadar diğer listeyi güncellemez (daha sonra kaldırabilirsiniz).
migration-notice-body: The pre-3.0 power format did not store individual Extra/Flaw costs, so each converted modifier has been defaulted to 1 point per rank. Each power's total cost has been preserved as recorded in the old sheet. Editing any field on a migrated power will recalculate its total using the defaulted modifier costs, which may produce an incorrect total until you manually enter the correct cost on each Extra and Flaw. The original legacy data has been preserved in the Legacy Archive for reference.
migration-notice-body-json: Your Hero Lab data was detected and used as the authoritative source for matched powers. Per-rank modifier costs, effect typing, and attack tiers have been preserved from the original import. Powers whose names couldn't be matched to the Hero Lab JSON have been converted from the legacy sheet format using defaulted modifier costs — review the Legacy Archive to spot-check them.
cost-backfill-body: This sheet has been updated to compute power costs from the structured effect/modifier breakdown rather than relying on the migrated total alone. To preserve your existing power totals, each power's "Bonus Power Points" field has been set to the difference between its displayed cost and what the structured breakdown produces.
cost-backfill-body-howto: When you enter individual extras and flaws into the new builder, those costs will be added to the structured total — so you should subtract the same amount from the Bonus field on that power as you go, keeping the displayed total stable. The Bonus field lives in the power editor next to the cost display.
